Wave: Small Business Software
Clear books.
Conﬁdent
decisions.
The single source of truth for your business finances. Wave keeps your accounting, invoicing, payments, and more in one unified system. Gain financial clarity and stay tax-ready year-round.
The single source of truth for your business finances. Wave keeps your accounting, invoicing, payments, and more in one unified system. Gain financial clarity and stay tax-ready year-round.
Get started for free
Your account
More reasons to love Wave
More reasons to love Wave
Make bookkeeping and tax time easy with solutions that are affordable, small biz friendly, and—dare we say—fun to use.
No sweat accounting
Track income and expenses, manage cash flow, and access reporting that’ll help you make smart business decisions.
Easy invoicing
Create beautiful, professional invoices and estimates in only a few clicks and wow your customers.
Secure online payments
Give your customers the choice of quickly paying you using credit card, bank transfer, or Apple Pay.
Painless payroll
Reliably pay employees and yourself and manage contractors without worrying about the complicated legal stuff.
Learn more
Learn more
Learn more
Learn more

Tatiyanna W.
TruCreates.com
"Wave makes your life a whole lot
easier and takes that worry off you.
I've tried Quickbooks—it's a bit more complicated and technical, and takes more time to set up."
Eric Silverberg & Eli Gladstone
Speaker Labs
“Wave’s invoicing is unbeatable.
In eight years, we haven’t had a single unpaid invoice
, thanks to how easy it is to create, send, and follow up. Our invoicing process would be lost without it!”
Ben Durham-Kilcullen
Kilcullen Technologies
"If you run a small business or if you’re a solopreneur, I would definitely recommend Wave. I was able to come in with a very limited accounting background and do
exactly what I needed.
"
Get started for free
Spend more time on what you
love
Breathe that sigh of relief
With everything in one place, there’s no need to endlessly research solutions or stare at spreadsheets until your eyes glaze over. Plus, our features are designed to work together, meaning less to worry about.
Make it without the fake it
Unlike other software, Wave is built for small business owners and solopreneurs at every stage—not accountants—so it’s easy for you to use. Look and feel polished, keep your books organized, and kick tax season’s butt, whether you’re a newbie or seasoned pro.
Be the wiz of your biz
Keep tabs on your cash flow, know who owes you and who you owe, and access important reports to stay in the know—even on-the-go, with our mobile app, the convenient companion to your desktop experience.

From the blog
Is your business actually profitable? Check in 10 minutes
Stop guessing and start knowing. This 10-minute guide helps small business owners move beyond "feeling busy" to identify hidden cash drains and confirm true profitability.
Why your P&L and bank statement don't match
Ever wonder why your bookkeeping shows a profit but your bank account feels empty? Discover the key differences between your P&L and bank statements and how to master your cash flow.
Tax forms for small businesses in the United States
Know exactly which IRS forms your small business needs — returns by entity, 1099-NEC, W-2/941/940, Form 4562, estimates, extensions — plus checklists to stay compliant.
Tax credits and deductions for sole proprietors in Canada
Filing as a Canadian sole proprietor? Learn deductions and credits—home office, vehicle, CCA, GST/HST, and more—plus how Wave keeps you CRA-ready.
Tax credits and deductions for LLCs — 2026 guide
Running an LLC? Learn the top 2026 deductions and tax credits — Section 179, QBI, home office, and more — plus how Wave keeps you organized and IRS-ready.
Tax benefits of LLCs: How small businesses can save
Discover the tax advantages of an LLC for your small business. Learn how to reduce liability, save money, and simplify taxes with Wave.

Bookkeeping & Accounting
Business planning
Cash flow

How does Wave compare to other accounting and invoicing software?
Wave vs.
HoneyBook
Wave vs.
QuickBooks
Wave vs.
FreshBooks
Wave vs.
ZipBooks
Wave vs.
Xero
Wave vs.
Sage
Frequently Asked Questions
Expand all
Collapse all
Is Wave's software something I need to install?
Wave's tools are web-based, so you just need an Internet connection and browser—no installation is necessary for our online software!
‍
If you're looking for an
on-the-go
solution, you can install our
mobile app
to help you manage invoices and payments. Download our mobile app on
iOS
and
Android
today!
What if I just want to try Wave to see if it works for my business?
Sign up for the Starter Plan to take the bookkeeping and invoicing basics for a spin. Then, whenever you’re ready, upgrade to the
Pro Plan
to unlock even more money management features. Our plans are built for small business owners at every stage!
Can I change plans easily?
You bet! To upgrade to the
Pro Plan
, sign into Wave. Visit your dashboard or use your invoicing or accounting features, and click the “Upgrade now” button. Learn more about
changing subscription periods and plan types
in our Help Center.
Is my data secure when I use Wave?
Our servers are protected physically and electronically. Any connections between you, your bank accounts, and Wave are protected by 256-bit SSL encryption. Wave is a PCI-DSS Level 1 Service Provider.
Do you provide customer support?
We provide different levels of support, depending on the plan and/or the add-on features you choose. Learn more about how Wave support works
here
.
Is it easy to cancel for any reason after I subscribe?
Yes, you can unsubscribe at any time! The cancellation of your subscription will take effect at the end of the billing period in which you cancel. Learn how to
cancel your subscription
in our Help Center.

Frequently Asked Questions
Expand all
Collapse all
What if I just want to try Wave to see if it works for my business?
Sign up for the Starter Plan to take the bookkeeping and invoicing basics for a spin. Then, whenever you’re ready, upgrade to the
Pro Plan
to unlock even more money management features. Our plans are built for small business owners at every stage!
Do I automatically qualify for online payments if I sign up for Pro?
Approval to use online payments is subject to eligibility criteria, including identity verification and credit review. You’ll need to answer a few questions about your business and provide us with a little more information about yourself in order to get approve

docs.title: Help Center
docs.text:
Help Center
Submit a request
Sign in
How can we help?
Whether you're new to managing your books, or an ace at small business accounting, the Help Center has the answers you need to succeed using Wave
Browse by topic
Accounting
Transaction Imports
Invoices & Estimates
Manage Your Account
Payments
Payroll
Receipts & Bills
Other Resources
Guides
Resources
Looking to get the most out of Wave for your business? Try searching the Help Center or get started quickly with answers to commonly asked questions in the resources below.
Wave Connect: Easily import and export data
Learn how to quickly import key accounting data. Wave’s Google Sheets add-on lets you import and export customers, products, and invoices, as well as bulk import journal transactions and bank transactions.
Get started with Wave Payments
Add credit card and bank payment options to your invoices to get paid faster. Wave takes care of the bookkeeping automatically so that you can focus on running your business. Check out this guide to get started.
Understand your chart of accounts
Wave is for everyone who manages their business finances without a background in accounting. If you’re looking to learn how to navigate and use your Chart of Accounts, get up to speed here.
Import bank transactions
Save time bookkeeping by importing transactions from your bank. Learn more about setting up an automatic bank connection, troubleshoot common issues, or how to upload your transactions using statements.
Featured Articles
Refund a customer payment
Refund a paymentRefund eligibilityRefund a paymentYou can send either a full or partial refund.
On the left-side menu, click Sales & Payments > Payments.
Click on the payment you want to refund.
Cl...

analysis.name: Wave
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one accounting, invoicing, payments, and payroll for small businesses in a single unified system.
analysis.ideal_customer: Solopreneurs and small business owners with limited accounting backgrounds who want simple, affordable financial management

features.name: accounting
features.description: Track income and expenses, manage cash flow, and access financial reporting
features.evidence_quote: Track income and expenses for more accurate books

features.name: invoicing
features.description: Create and send professional invoices to clients
features.evidence_quote: Create unlimited estimates, invoices, bills, and bookkeeping records

features.name: estimates
features.description: Create and send estimates to clients before invoicing
features.evidence_quote: Create unlimited estimates, invoices, bills, and bookkeeping records

features.name: deposits
features.description: Collect deposits from clients to secure projects
features.evidence_quote: Create estimates and collect deposits to secure projects

features.name: online payments
features.description: Accept credit card, bank transfer, and Apple Pay payments on invoices
features.evidence_quote: Option to accept online payments

features.name: apple pay acceptance
features.description: Accept Apple Pay as a payment method on invoices
features.evidence_quote: Give your customers the choice of quickly paying you using credit card, bank transfer, or Apple Pay.

features.name: bank transfer acceptance
features.description: Accept ACH bank transfer payments from customers
features.evidence_quote: Accept credit cards and bank payments to get paid fast

features.name: mobile app
features.description: Manage invoices, expenses, and receipts from a mobile device
features.evidence_quote: Manage invoices, expenses, and receipts on-the-go

features.name: mobile invoicing
features.description: Create and send invoices from mobile app
features.evidence_quote: Invoice on-the-go with the mobile app

features.name: cash flow dashboard
features.description: View and manage cash flow and customers from a single dashboard
features.evidence_quote: Manage cash flow and customers in one dashboard

features.name: payroll
features.description: Run payroll for employees and contractors
features.evidence_quote: Reliably pay employees and yourself and manage contractors without worrying about the complicated legal stuff.

features.name: contractor payments
features.description: Manage and pay contractors alongside employees
features.evidence_quote: Run payroll for employees or contractors with peace of mind

features.name: receipt scanning
features.description: Digitally capture and store receipts to track and organize expenses
features.evidence_quote: Digitally capture unlimited receipts and track expenses

features.name: bank transaction auto-import
features.description: Automatically import transactions from connected bank accounts
features.evidence_quote: Auto-import bank transactions

features.name: bank transaction auto-categorization
features.description: Automatically merge and categorize imported bank transactions
features.evidence_quote: Auto-merge and categorize bank transactions

features.name: late payment reminders
features.description: Automated reminders sent to clients with overdue invoices
features.evidence_quote: Automate late payment reminders

features.name: discounted payment processing
features.description: Lower per-transaction fees on credit card payments (no per-transaction flat fee)
features.evidence_quote: Option to accept online payments at a discounted rate 2.9% + $0 per credit card transaction

features.name: chart of accounts
features.description: Standard chart of accounts for organizing business finances
features.evidence_quote: Understand your chart of accounts

features.name: bank statement csv import
features.description: Upload bank transactions manually via CSV statement files
features.evidence_quote: how to upload your transactions using statements

features.name: bank connection
features.description: Automatic live bank feed connection for transaction sync
features.evidence_quote: setting up an automatic bank connection

features.name: payment refunds
features.description: Issue full or partial refunds to customers for processed payments
features.evidence_quote: You can send either a full or partial refund.

features.name: google sheets integration (wave connect)
features.description: Import and export customers, products, invoices, journal transactions, and bank transactions via Google Sheets add-on
features.evidence_quote: Wave's Google Sheets add-on lets you import and export customers, products, and invoices, as well as bulk import journal transactions

features.name: bulk data import
features.description: Bulk import journal transactions and bank transactions via Wave Connect
features.evidence_quote: bulk import journal transactions and bank transactions

features.name: bills management
features.description: Track and manage bills payable
features.evidence_quote: Create unlimited estimates, invoices, bills, and bookkeeping records

features.name: bookkeeping records
features.description: Maintain unlimited bookkeeping records for business transactions
features.evidence_quote: Create unlimited estimates, invoices, bills, and bookkeeping records

features.name: advisors (managed bookkeeping)
features.description: Dedicated in-house bookkeeper manages your books and prepares monthly financial statements
features.evidence_quote: A dedicated bookkeeper to keep your books accurate and up to date

features.name: monthly financial statements (advisors)
features.description: Professionally prepared monthly financial statements included with Advisors plan
features.evidence_quote: Monthly financial statements prepared for you

features.name: accounting coach
features.description: Optional one-on-one guidance from an accounting coach as add-on to Advisors
features.evidence_quote: Optional packages for one-on-one guidance from an accounting coach

features.name: software migration onboarding
features.description: Assisted onboarding when switching from other accounting software (e.g. FreshBooks)
features.evidence_quote: Onboarding when switching from other accounting software, like Freshbooks

features.name: tax readiness
features.description: Keep books organized and reports clean so business is ready for tax time year-round
features.evidence_quote: Be ready for tax time with clean, organized books and reports

features.name: customer management
features.description: Manage customer records alongside cash flow in one dashboard
features.evidence_quote: Manage cash flow and customers in one dashboard

differentiators: Free Starter plan with unlimited invoices, estimates, and bookkeeping records
All-in-one unified system: accounting, invoicing, payments, payroll in one platform
In-house non-judgmental bookkeeping and accounting advisors available
Simpler setup than QuickBooks for users with limited accounting background
No per-transaction flat fee on credit card payments for Pro plan subscribers

praised: "Wave makes your life a whole lot easier and takes that worry off you." — Tatiyanna W., TruCreates.com
"Wave's invoicing is unbeatable. In eight years, we haven't had a single unpaid invoice, thanks to how easy it is to create, send, and follow up." — Eric Silverberg & Eli Gladstone, Speaker Labs
Simpler and faster to set up than QuickBooks
"I was able to come in with a very limited accounting background and do exactly what I needed." — Ben Durham-Kilcullen, Kilcullen Technologies

free_tier.limits: unlimited invoices/estimates/bills/bookkeeping records; no bank auto-import; no receipt capture; standard payment processing rates

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited invoices, estimates, bills, bookkeeping; online payments at 2.9%+$0.60; mobile app

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Starter + bank auto-import, auto-categorization, unlimited receipts, late payment reminders, 2.9%+$0 card rate

tiers.name: Wave Advisors
tiers.headline_inclusions: Pro features + dedicated bookkeeper, monthly financial statements, expert support, tax-ready books, migration onboarding

pricing.notes: Pro annual billed as $190/year (saves $38 vs monthly). Pro monthly promo: $9.50/month for first 3 months (saves $28.50). CAD pricing: $25/month or $250/year. Advisors starting at $199/month — actual price may vary by scope. Mobile receipts NOT included in Advisors plan despite being a Pro feature. Payment processing is usage-based on top of plan fee; Amex always costs 3.4%+fee regardless of tier.
